cli.config.entrypoint.select_help: Welcome to Manboster Configuration Wizard! Please choose the field you want to configure.
cli.config.entrypoint.database:
Database
Manage chats, users and sessions. Purge unused sessions, manage users, and more.
cli.config.entrypoint.config:
Configuration
Manage model and chat provider settings. Modify models, default models, or application settings.
cli.config.entrypoint.editor:
Open config.yaml in system default editor
(For advanced users only)
cli.config.entrypoint.quit:
Quit the Manboster Configuration Wizard
Bye!
cli.config.landing.select_help: Please choose what you want to configure.
cli.config.landing.chat:
Chat Providers
Add, edit or delete your chat providers.
cli.config.landing.llm:
LLM Providers
Add, edit or delete your LLM providers.
cli.config.landing.tool:
Tool Providers
Add, edit or delete your tool providers.
cli.config.landing.hachimi:
Hachimi Settings
Add, edit or delete your Hachimi providers or modify Hachimi settings.

cli.config.database.sessions:
Sessions
Manage your chat sessions. Purge unused sessions to save disk space.
cli.config.database.users:
Users
Grant or revoke admin access for users.
cli.config.database.souls:
Souls
Souls are system prompts that personalize your Manbo Lobster.
cli.config.soul.delete_confirm: Do you want to delete soul {{ .Name }}? THIS ACTION IS IRREVERSIBLE!
cli.config.soul.name_help: Enter a unique name for this soul.
cli.config.soul.content_help: Enter the system prompt content for this soul.
cli.config.config_run.daemon_running: Manboster is running, please run 'manboster stop' to stop it first.
cli.config.config_run.init_error: Error initializing config: {{ .Error }}. Please run 'manboster onboard' or 'manboster' first.
cli.config.config_run.edit_create_prompt: Do you want to create a new one and edit it? [y/N]:

cli.config.config_run.open_not_found: Config file not found! Please run `manboster onboard` at least once.
